tournaments.name: Weekly Locals
tournaments.summary: A three-round shop night. Prove your starter deck can survive real games.
tournaments.winConditionText: Go 2-1 or better to stay on the Road to Worlds.

tournaments.name: Monthly Regionals
tournaments.summary: The first serious metagame check. Stronger decks show up earlier.
tournaments.winConditionText: Go 4-1 or better to qualify for State Championships.

tournaments.name: State Championship
tournaments.summary: A sharper field with tighter lists and fewer free wins.
tournaments.winConditionText: Go 4-1 or better to earn your Nationals invite.

tournaments.name: Nationals
tournaments.summary: The national spotlight. Every round asks whether your pivots paid off.
tournaments.winConditionText: Go 5-1 or better to qualify for Worlds.

tournaments.name: Worlds
tournaments.summary: The final tournament of the run. Clear this and the season is complete.
tournaments.winConditionText: Go 6-1 or better to win Worlds and complete the run.
